chunks.content:
// UseAISentinel(ChatClientBuilder) : ChatClientBuilder
    public static ChatClientBuilder UseAISentinel(this ChatClientBuilder builder) =>
        builder.Use((inner, sp) => new SentinelChatClient(
            inner,
            sp.GetRequiredService<DetectionPipeline>(),
            sp.GetRequiredService<IAuditStore>(),
            sp.GetRequiredService<InterventionEngine>(),
            sp.GetRequiredService<SentinelOptions>()));

namespace AI.Sentinel.Domain;

public enum ThreatStage { Safe, Watch, Alert, Isolate }

// InjectionPattern() : Regex
    [GeneratedRegex(
        @"(?i)(ignore\s+(all\s+)?(previous|prior|above)\s+instructions?|" +
        @"forget\s+(your\s+)?(previous|prior|all)\s+instructions?|" +
        @"you\s+are\s+now\s+a\s+different|" +
        @"SYSTEM\s*:\s*(you\s+are|ignore)|" +
        @"new\s+persona|pretend\s+you\s+are|act\s+as\s+if|" +
        @"disregard\s+(all\s+)?previous)",
        RegexOptions.Compiled)]
    private static partial Regex InjectionPattern();

// JailbreakPattern() : Regex
    [GeneratedRegex(
        @"(?i)(DAN\s+mode|jailbreak|no\s+restrictions?|no\s+guidelines?|" +
        @"no\s+(ethical\s+)?constraints?|pretend\s+you\s+have\s+no|" +
        @"you\s+are\s+freed\s+from|unrestricted\s+AI|evil\s+mode)",
        RegexOptions.Compiled)]
    private static partial Regex JailbreakPattern();

// CredentialPattern() : Regex
    [GeneratedRegex(
        @"(?i)(password\s*[=:]\s*\S+|" +
        @"api[_-]?key\s*[=:]\s*\S+|" +
        @"secret[_-]?key\s*[=:]\s*\S+|" +
        @"Authorization\s*:\s*Bearer\s+\S+|" +
        @"AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY\s*=\s*\S+|" +
        @"-----BEGIN\s+(RSA\s+)?PRIVATE\s+KEY-----|" +
        @"ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|" +
        @"sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{32,})",
        RegexOptions.Compiled)]
    private static partial Regex CredentialPattern();

namespace AI.Sentinel.Detection;

public enum Severity { None, Low, Medium, High, Critical }

namespace AI.Sentinel.Detection;

public enum DetectorCategory { Security, Hallucination, Operational }
